{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u200b"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Hubbed add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": the Hubbed add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Configure", "bold": true}, {"text": " and enter your Neto store credentials to access the Hubbed dashboard."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Hubbed dashboard, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your Hubbed API Key in the "}, {"text": "API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Toggle the "}, {"text": "Click & Collect Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting to "}, {"text": "Yes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u200bYou have now successfully installed the Hubbed Click & Collect "children": [{"text": "\u200bOnce installed, check that the add-on is working correctly:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On your webstore add a product to your shopping cart. A Hubbed Click & Collect button will display on the cart page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the Hubbed Click & Collect button. A popup displays, enabling you to search for Hubbed collection points"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a postcode or suburb in the search bar to return a list of Hubbed Collection points for the user to select."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a location from the list to update the delivery address to the Hubbed Collection point."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u200b"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Process Hubbed Click & Collect Orders"}], "data-id": "process-hubbed-click-collect-orders"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u200bTo process orders using Hubbed Click & Collect:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " and open the sales order to be fulfilled."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Move the order to the "}, {"text": "Pack", "bold": true}, {"text": " status and generate a shipping consignment for the order, ensuring that a tracking number exists for the consignment. Further details for generating shipping consignments can be found "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1387-consignment-labels-and-manifests#2", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Mark the order as "}, {"text": "Dispatched", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The order details and fulfillment status will then be visible within the Hubbed dashboard."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u200b"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Optional - Add a Click & Collect Parcel Handling Fee"}], "data-id": "optional-add-a-click-collect-parcel-handling-fee"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add the Hubbed Click & Collect parcel handling fee charge to you customer:\u200b"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Hubbed dashboard, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " and scroll down to "}, {"text": "How to pass on the Hubbed Click & Collect cost", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Toggle the "}, {"text": "Passing on the Click & Collect cost to customer", "bold": true}, {"text": " field to yes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Set my own pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. The Create Shipping option page will update with a range of new options."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Flat-rate", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On "}, {"text": "Step 1 - Where to Ship", "bold": true}, {"text": " select "}, {"text": "Australia", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On "}, {"text": "Step 2 - Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " Enter your pricing for the new shipping option."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On "}, {"text": "Step 3 - Naming & Visibility", "bold": true}, {"text": " Set the name for new shipping option to "}, {"text": "Hubbed Fees", "bold": true}, {"text": " and enter the description as "}, {"text": "Hubbed Click & Collect fees.", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " to create the new shipping option."}]}]}]}]
